Button.TooltipReference: General settings
Mouse-look settings
Nameplate toggles
Nameplate colors
Display, chase-camera, and world settings
Target ring settings
Sound toggles
Floating combat damage
Classic vs modern item models
Enable rof2ClientPlus mouse-look sensitivity
Confine the mouse cursor to the game window (released when you alt-tab away)
Right-click a wearable item in a bag to auto-equip it into the best slot (a clicky item casts instead; Alt+right-click equips it). Same as /rcpequip.
Draw custom-font 3D nameplates and hide the default names (/rcpfont)
Show the health bar
Show your mana bar (self only)
Show your stamina bar (self only)
Tint NPC nameplates by con level
Tint players by guild/AFK/LFG/LD/roleplay/PVP; corpses too
Highlight the current target's nameplate
Pulse the target's nameplate (any coloring mode, PCs and NPCs)
Wrap the target's name in brackets
Append the target's HP percent to its nameplate
Blank your own nameplate (unless it is your target)
Edit the 'Con: even' nameplate color
Edit the 'Con: yellow' nameplate color
Edit the 'Con: red' nameplate color
Edit the 'Con: green' nameplate color
Edit the 'Con: light blue' nameplate color
Edit the 'Con: blue' nameplate color
Edit the 'Target' nameplate color
Edit the 'PvP' nameplate color
Edit the 'AFK' nameplate color
Edit the 'Linkdead' nameplate color
Edit the 'LFG' nameplate color
Edit the 'Group' nameplate color
Edit the 'Raid' nameplate color
Edit the 'Roleplay' nameplate color
Edit the 'My guild' nameplate color
Edit the 'Corpse' nameplate color
Edit the 'GM' nameplate color
Edit the 'Player' nameplate color
Remove the client's distance fog haze in every zone, day and night (/rcpfog)
Show the original pre-2013 spell book / gem / buff icon art instead of the revamped icons, swapped live (/rcpspellicons)
Adjust the mouse-wheel third-person chase camera (/rcpchase)
Draw a solid-color ring on the ground under your target (/rcpring)
Do not draw the ring when your target is yourself
Color the ring by the target's con level instead of the fixed color below
Size the ring's outer edge to the target's melee range (how close you must be to land a melee hit); overrides the outer radius
Click to pick the fixed target-ring color (used when con colors are off)
Slowly rotate the ring graphic; when off, the graphic faces the target's heading

Label.Text: Add a played sound to the list:
Tracked sounds (click one to adjust; scroll for more):

Button.TooltipReference: Stop tracking the selected sound; it plays normally again
Put your logged-in character's name in the game window's title bar, restored when you camp. Same as /rcpwindow title.
Button.Text: Show character name in window title

Button.TooltipReference: Prefix every chat line with the local time, the way Zeal does (default [HH:MM:SS]). Same as /timestamp on|off.
Automatically switch AA experience on or off based on how far into the current level you are. Same as /rcpaaexp on|off.

Label.Text: Turn AA on above level XP

Button.TooltipReference: Show rising, fading damage numbers over things as they are hit (/rcpfcd)
Show damage dealt by you or your pet
Show melee (non-spell) hits
Show damage dealt to you
Show spell / non-melee hits
Show everyone else's damage (mob-on-mob, other players and pets)
Click to pick the color for your own damage
Click to pick the color for damage done to you
Click to pick the color for everyone else's damage
Click to pick the color for hits at or above the big-hit threshold

Label.Text: Items - click a row to toggle:
Creatures - click a row to toggle:

Button.TooltipReference: Switch every listed weapon graphic to its classic version
Switch every listed weapon graphic back to its modern version
Switch every listed creature to its classic model
Switch every listed creature back to its modern model
